page_metadata.biotools__summary: SUPERGNOVA (SUPER GeNetic cOVariance Analyzer) is a statistical framework to perform local genetic covariance analysis. SUPERGNOVA only needs GWAS summary data and a reference panel as input data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SUPERGNOVA (SUPER GeNetic cOVariance Analyzer) is a statistical framework to perform local genetic covariance analysis. SUPERGNOVA only needs GWAS summary data and a reference panel as input data.
